name: RuPaul's Drag Race: Vegas Revue
overview: Follow Naomi Smalls, Derrick Barry, Vanessa Vanjie Mateo and other queens from RuPaul’s Drag Race as Mama Ru leads them through the next level in their careers with a Las Vegas residency.

trailers.title: RuPaul’s Drag Race: Vegas Revue Trailer – Premieres August 21 @ 8/7C
Sneak Peek: The stakes are high for “RuPaul’s Drag Race Live!”
